name: French Fry Pizza Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Frozen shoestring potatoes (French fried), about 5 cups
1/2 Green bell pepper, cut into 1/4-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Spray a 12-inch round pizza pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Arrange the frozen potatoes in an even layer on the pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes.
5. Remove the pan from the oven and cover the potatoes with sauce.
6. Sprinkle oregano over the potatoes.
7. Arrange pepper strips on top of the sauce; sprinkle onions and cheese evenly.
8. Return the pan to the oven and bake for about 15 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
